goal: Close the fixed fourteen-task post-Golden migration program after all fifteen public source units are Golden conformant and all authoritative KnowledgeOperation registries and generated designer views pass machine validation.

means: All fourteen approved tasks A00 through A13 are complete.
All fifteen public source units are GOLDEN_CONFORMANT, production eligible and COMPLETE.
All fifteen authoritative unit KnowledgeOperation JSON files exist and validate.
The master index reports 156 KnowledgePoints, 156 canonical operation models and 273 existing question bindings.
All unmapped KnowledgePoint, unmapped existing-question and conflicting operation-model counters are zero.
No unit bypasses shared runtime and no migration added a per-unit generator, validator, renderer or workflow.
The designer Excel master and audit summary CSV remain deterministic generated views of JSON authority.
The closeout inherits already admitted production HTML/PDF evidence rather than generating a new learner-visible worksheet.
doesNotMean: Application-question coverage is expanded beyond each unit's admitted current runtime.
New scenario families, UI controls, layouts or learner-visible content are introduced.
Future work outside POST_GOLDEN_UNIT_CONFORMANCE_MIGRATION_V1 is automatically approved.

closeout.requiredOperatorAction: Approve a new program before modifying scope beyond POST_GOLDEN_UNIT_CONFORMANCE_MIGRATION_V1.
